Hospital Furniture

Chiropractic & Electric Chiropractic Table

Professional DC motor-driven chiropractic table for waist, neck, shoulder, foot. Suitable for rehabilitation training, Chinese medicine massage, orthopedics. Hi-lo function with Dun pressure principal.

  • Professional medical DC motor; low noise, stability
  • Applicable to rehabilitation, Chinese medicine, orthopedics
  • Portable chiropractic table also available
  • Adjustable prone position with long table top
  • For spinal adjustment and chiropractic technique classes

Electric Bobath Table

Large table top for exercise movements with both patient and therapist. Adjustable prone position selection. For patients with lung-related diseases, drainage positioning, and neurological conditions.

  • Large table top for bilateral patient-therapist exercises
  • Adjustable prone position for drainage
  • Hi-lo function; back support adjustment
  • For neurological condition monitoring and positioning
  • Sturdy hospital-grade construction

Rehab Suspension Unit

Saddle Chair with Feet Ring Back Rest

Ergonomically split seat style reduces painful pressure on back and spine. Hydraulic height adjustable. Improves leg circulation, balance, and reduces foot swelling.

  • Aluminium base for extra stability with foot rest

DVT Pump & Limb Therapy Systems

Compression therapy for DVT prevention, lymphedema treatment, post-mastectomy care, muscular tone improvement in immobilized patients. 4 and 6 chamber leg compression units.

  • Increases volume and velocity of venous blood flow
  • Decreases venous stasis, blood pooling, and endothelial damage
  • Enhances fibrinolysis; activates anti-clotting factors
  • 4 & 6 chamber leg compression for progressive massage
  • Mobilization Muligan Belt for traction and stability
